title: General starter
description: Domain-neutral starters that show the core loop: the orchestrator writes Python, runs it in the sandbox, and returns structured results. Good first tasks for a new install.

templates.title: Summarize tabular data
templates.description: Parse rows of data and return summary statistics as JSON.
templates.query: Parse the CSV-style data in the context with pandas, then print a JSON object with the row count, column names, and the mean of every numeric column. Then summarize what the data shows in one sentence.

templates.title: Structured extraction from text
templates.description: Pull named entities / fields out of free text into JSON.
templates.query: From the text in the context, extract every email address, every dollar amount, and every date. Run Python (use the re module) and print a JSON object with keys: emails, amounts, dates. Then report how many of each you found.
templates.example_context: Invoice sent to billing@globex.com on 2026-04-15 for $1,250.00; reminder to ap@acme.io due 2026-05-01 for $980.50.

templates.title: Ad-hoc calculation
templates.description: Do a multi-step numeric computation and return the result.
templates.query: Compute the monthly payment on a loan using the figures in the context (standard amortization formula). Run Python and print a JSON object with keys: monthly_payment, total_paid, total_interest. Then state the monthly payment.
templates.example_context: Principal $250,000; annual interest rate 6.0%; term 30 years.
